living-abstract.essence: Identify the ideal solver, become that solver, then solve
living-abstract.purpose: Elevate problem-solving by elevating the solver - the master meta-cognitive skill
living-abstract.ability: Decompose ideal solver into required disciplines mapped to skill tree axes
Temporarily assume expert composite perspective - think FROM elevation
Produce output worthy of ideal solver
living-abstract.principle: Quality depends on producer - elevate producer first
Any ideal solver decomposes into loadable capabilities
Load for task, release after - no permanent transformation
